basics.name: Sahil Pandita
basics.title: Marketplace Performance Lead
basics.summary: Client-facing marketplace performance specialist with 5+ years of total professional experience, including 4.5+ years managing global Amazon retail media portfolios. Currently managing EU Amazon accounts across UK and Italian markets, optimising €1.5M+ in annual media investments and leading client strategy, business reviews, and a 4-member performance pod.

bullets: Manage Amazon retail media campaigns across EU portfolios (UK and Italy), overseeing €1.5M+ in annual media investments.
Act as client-facing partner, leading MBRs and QBRs while translating brand objectives into retail media strategies.
Drove 28.34% YoY GMV growth through demand-driven search expansion, keyword prioritisation, and budget scaling toward high-converting segments.
Maintain daily pacing reports and weekly performance trackers across all active portfolio accounts.
Lead a 4-member performance pod, ensuring campaign execution quality and optimisation delivery.
Leverage AMC and SQL analysis to identify optimisation opportunities and validate incremental revenue contribution.
Track portfolio budget utilisation and support monthly spend reconciliation and billing documentation.
Retail Media & Ads: Managed Sponsored Ads accounts (SA, SB, SD) for advertisers and sellers, conducting ad account audits and delivering optimisation recommendations to improve campaign efficiency.
Catalog & Retail Operations: Governed catalog quality standards across a 35-member global cross-functional team including PMs, BIAs, and Program Managers.
Designed SOP frameworks ensuring listing readiness and marketplace compliance across international markets.
Reduced operational turnaround time by 35% through workflow automation and process redesign.
Partnered with Ads and Brand teams to align catalog governance with advertiser campaign performance objectives.
Retail Media & Ads: Supported advertiser and seller ad accounts through Sponsored Ads campaign management (SA, SB, SD), account audits, and performance optimisation recommendations.
Catalog & Retail Operations: Maintained 99.8% catalog accuracy while improving processing efficiency by 27%.
Optimised product listings to strengthen search visibility and campaign readiness.
Supported Prime Day and Great Indian Festival campaigns through cross-team coordination.
Contributed to SOP documentation and onboarding of new associates.
Increased closures by 27% through structured funnel optimisation.
Reduced complaints by 62% via proactive escalation handling.

achievements.context: monthly GMV supported across UK and Italy multi-brand Amazon portfolios.
YoY GMV growth delivered through demand-driven search expansion and media optimisation.
YoY category expansion driven, including 900% YoY growth in a key sub-category.
YoY scale achieved in one key sub-category.
revenue uplift vs BFCM forecast through demand-based budget reallocation.
ROAS maintained while stabilising TACoS across €25K–€150K/month investments.

certifications: Amazon Sponsored Ads Certification – Amazon Ads
AI-Powered Performance Ads Certification – Google Ads
awards: Recipient of the Above & Beyond Award: Apr 2022, Nov 2022, May 2023, Jun 2023
Acknowledged with the Rookie Star Award: Aug 2022
Acknowledged with the Rise n Shine Award: Sep 2025

bullets: Led 5-member team and generated INR 2M+ revenue via BYTECAMP Hackathon execution.
Managed 200+ student community; secured Best Team award at IEEE Bombay Conference.
Executed education and health outreach programs for underserved communities.
